mapper.select:
SELECT d.doc_id, d.doc_no, d.title, d.status, d.reject_reason, d.customer_id, d.supplier_id, d.requester_id, d.approver_id, DATE_FORMAT(d.requested_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS requested_at, DATE_FORMAT(d.approved_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS approved_at, DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, COALESCE(c.customer_name, s.supplier_name) AS partner_name, COALESCE(c.address, s.address) AS partner_address, r.name AS requester_name, a.name AS approver_name FROM approval_doc d LEFT JOIN customer c ON d.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON d.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN member r ON d.requester_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN member a ON d.approver_id = a.member_id
d.status = #{searchStatus}
AND d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTitle}, '%')
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.doc_id, d.doc_no, d.title, d.status, d.reject_reason, d.customer_id, d.supplier_id, d.requester_id, d.approver_id, DATE_FORMAT(d.requested_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS requested_at, DATE_FORMAT(d.approved_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS approved_at, DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, COALESCE(c.customer_name, s.supplier_name) AS partner_name, COALESCE(c.address, s.address) AS partner_address, r.name AS requester_name, a.name AS approver_name FROM approval_doc d LEFT JOIN customer c ON d.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON d.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN member r ON d.requester_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN member a ON d.approver_id = a.member_id WHERE d.doc_id = #{docId}

SELECT i.item_id, i.doc_id, i.product_id, i.qty, i.unit_cost, i.remarks, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.unit FROM approval_doc_item i JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY i.item_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_doc (doc_no, title, status, customer_id, supplier_id, requester_id, approver_id, created_at) VALUES (#{docNo}, #{title}, #{status}, #{customerId}, #{supplierId}, #{requesterId}, #{approverId}, NOW())
INSERT INTO approval_doc_item (doc_id, product_id, qty, unit_cost, remarks) VALUES (#{docId}, #{productId}, #{qty}, #{unitCost}, #{remarks})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM approval_doc WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
